languages.text: Архмилитант Батошски погиб одним из последних среди экипажа флагмана. Сражаясь с неизбежным стойко и отчаянно, перед смертью он процедил сквозь зубы: "Я так и знал, что все эти истории про звезды — комиссарские речи".

Arch-Militant Batoshski was one of the last of the flagship's crew to die. He fought against the inevitable with staunch ferocity, and before his death, he said through gritted teeth, "I knew all those stories about the stars were Commissar words."
languages.original_text: Архмилитант Батошски погиб одним из последних среди экипажа флагмана. Сражаясь с неизбежным стойко и отчаянно, перед смертью он процедил сквозь зубы: "Я так и знал, что все эти истории про звезды — комиссарские речи".

traits.locale_text: Arch-Militant Batoshski was one of the last of the flagship's crew to die. He fought against the inevitable with staunch ferocity, and before his death, he said through gritted teeth, "I knew all those stories about the stars were Commissar words."

Arch-Militant Batoshski was one of the last of the flagship's crew to die. He fought against the inevitable with staunch ferocity, and before his death, he said through gritted teeth, "I knew all those stories about the stars were Commissar words."

Arch-Militant Batoshski was one of the last of the flagship's crew to die. He fought against the inevitable with staunch ferocity, and before his death, he said through gritted teeth, "I knew all those stories about the stars were Commissar words."

languages.text: 旗艦の乗組員の中で最後の生き残りとなった大佐バトシュスキーは、避けられない運命に抵抗し、死の直前、歯を食いしばって言った。「あの星の話はすべて、コミッサールが作った話だ」
languages.original_text: Arch-Militant Batoshski was one of the last of the flagship's crew to die. He fought against the inevitable with staunch ferocity, and before his death, he said through gritted teeth, "I knew all those stories about the stars were Commissar words."

traits.locale_text: 旗艦の乗組員の中で最後の生き残りとなった大佐バトシュスキーは、避けられない運命に抵抗し、死の直前、歯を食いしばって言った。「あの星の話はすべて、コミッサールが作った話だ」

languages.text: 首席战士巴托什斯基是旗舰最后一批离世的老船员。一直以来，他坚定勇猛地抗击着不可避免的命运。临死前，他咬牙切齿地说：“我早就知道，那些星星的故事，全是政委的鬼话。”
languages.original_text: Arch-Militant Batoshski was one of the last of the flagship's crew to die. He fought against the inevitable with staunch ferocity, and before his death, he said through gritted teeth, "I knew all those stories about the stars were Commissar words."

traits.locale_text: 首席战士巴托什斯基是旗舰最后一批离世的老船员。一直以来，他坚定勇猛地抗击着不可避免的命运。临死前，他咬牙切齿地说：“我早就知道，那些星星的故事，全是政委的鬼话。”

languages.text: L'archimilitant Batoshski fut l'un des derniers membres de l'équipage du vaisseau amiral à mourir. Il lutta contre l'inévitable avec une implacable férocité et, avant de succomber, déclara en serrant les dents : « Je savais que toutes ces histoires sur les étoiles n'étaient que des paroles de commissaire. »
languages.original_text: Arch-Militant Batoshski was one of the last of the flagship's crew to die. He fought against the inevitable with staunch ferocity, and before his death, he said through gritted teeth, "I knew all those stories about the stars were Commissar words."

traits.locale_text: L'archimilitant Batoshski fut l'un des derniers membres de l'équipage du vaisseau amiral à mourir. Il lutta contre l'inévitable avec une implacable férocité et, avant de succomber, déclara en serrant les dents : « Je savais que toutes ces histoires sur les étoiles n'étaient que des paroles de commissaire. »

languages.text: El Archimilitante Batoshski fue uno de los últimos miembros de la tripulación de la nave insignia en morir. Luchó contra lo inevitable con una ferocidad incansable y, antes de su muerte, dijo con los dientes apretados: «Sabía que todas esas historias sobre las estrellas eran palabras de Comisario».
languages.original_text: Arch-Militant Batoshski was one of the last of the flagship's crew to die. He fought against the inevitable with staunch ferocity, and before his death, he said through gritted teeth, "I knew all those stories about the stars were Commissar words."

traits.locale_text: El Archimilitante Batoshski fue uno de los últimos miembros de la tripulación de la nave insignia en morir. Luchó contra lo inevitable con una ferocidad incansable y, antes de su muerte, dijo con los dientes apretados: «Sabía que todas esas historias sobre las estrellas eran palabras de Comisario».

languages.text: Başmilitan Batoshski, sancak gemisi mürettebatı içinde ölen son kişilerden biri oldu. Kaçınılmaz olana karşı sarsılmaz bir vahşetle savaştı ve ölümünden önce dişlerini sıkarak şunları söyledi: "Yıldızlara dair anlatılanların, Komiser zırvası olduğunu biliyordum."
languages.original_text: Arch-Militant Batoshski was one of the last of the flagship's crew to die. He fought against the inevitable with staunch ferocity, and before his death, he said through gritted teeth, "I knew all those stories about the stars were Commissar words."

traits.locale_text: Başmilitan Batoshski, sancak gemisi mürettebatı içinde ölen son kişilerden biri oldu. Kaçınılmaz olana karşı sarsılmaz bir vahşetle savaştı ve ölümünden önce dişlerini sıkarak şunları söyledi: "Yıldızlara dair anlatılanların, Komiser zırvası olduğunu biliyordum."

languages.text: Erzmilitant Batoshski war einer der letzten Gefallenen des Flaggschiffs. Er kämpfte mit wilder Entschlossenheit gegen das Unvermeidbare und erklärte kurz vor seinem Tod mit zusammengebissenen Zähnen: 'Ich wusste, all die Geschichten über die Sterne waren Kommissarsworte."
languages.original_text: Arch-Militant Batoshski was one of the last of the flagship's crew to die. He fought against the inevitable with staunch ferocity, and before his death, he said through gritted teeth, "I knew all those stories about the stars were Commissar words."

traits.locale_text: Erzmilitant Batoshski war einer der letzten Gefallenen des Flaggschiffs. Er kämpfte mit wilder Entschlossenheit gegen das Unvermeidbare und erklärte kurz vor seinem Tod mit zusammengebissenen Zähnen: 'Ich wusste, all die Geschichten über die Sterne waren Kommissarsworte."
